evals.prompt: Why is this query slow? Here is the actual execution plan from SSMS at skills/sqlplan-review/examples/horrible.sqlplan. The query used to run in 200ms, now 8 seconds.
evals.expected_output: Structured analysis identifying slow operators (key lookups N5, expensive scans N4, parameter sniffing S9, cardinality mismatches N21, memory grant issues S2/S18). Prioritized Fix Sequence table. Passed Checks lists every S/N check evaluated.

evals.prompt: Run sqlplan-review on this plan and tell me the top 3 things to fix. I have 30 minutes before standup.
evals.expected_output: Output focuses on top 3 highest-impact findings ranked by severity and effort, each with concrete fix steps. Emphasizes the Prioritized Fix Sequence table.
